# Pre-AIOS raw/ snapshot

**Original repo path:** `/Users/justinlobaito/repos/inside-out/`
**Original folder path (relative):** `raw/`
**Date staged:** 2026-05-23
**Source format:** Companion `raw/` folder to the pre-AIOS LLM-Wiki at the project root. Subfolders `brand/`, `copy/`, `photos/`, `reference/` containing only `.gitkeep` placeholders (no actual source documents ingested yet) plus a `README.md` describing the ingest workflow.
**File count:** 1 README.md + 4 `.gitkeep` files.

This snapshot is immutable. The README content lives at [`../../README.md`](../../README.md) (path-updated for the new layout). The empty subfolders have been recreated under the AIOS-canonical [`docs/wiki/raw/`](../../) layout alongside the new `external/`, `aios/`, and `aios-snapshot/` folders.
